name: Brie and Bacon Omelet
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a 10-inch ovenproof skillet or omelet pan, tilting the pan to coat the bottom and sides.
2. Saute onion until tender, about 3 minutes.
3. Combine eggs, milk, and pepper.
4. Increase heat to medium-high. Pour egg mixture into skillet.
5. Stir once, then cook until edges begin to set.
6. Using a fork, gently pull the edges of the eggs away from the sides of the pan so that the uncooked portion flows under the cooked edges. Continue cooking until most of the egg mixture is set but the surface of the omelet is slightly wet.
7. Sprinkle cheese, bacon, and nuts over the top of the omelet.
8. Fold in half; cut into two pieces.
9. Garnish with fresh fruit.
10. Serve immediately.
